items.text:
# **CASTING CALL / Unpaid / Non-Union**

**Deadline:** May 9 (decisions made on a rolling basis, may close earlier)

Casting for 3 major roles and 2 minor roles for a historical romantic comedy short film, which will be showing at FEST New Directors and Films Festival in Portugal in late June. The film will be submitted to other festivals as opportunities arise.

All actors should be comfortable wearing period dress and delivering elevated / historical dialogue.

Shoot dates are TBD but will be during **mid to late May** in **Steveston, Richmond**. For major roles, in-person availability is also required in **early May** for **costume fittings**, which will be made custom to measurements.

# **Major Roles**

Helewise (lead) — Woman, Mid/Late 20's / European looking

Cozzo (romantic interest) — Man, Late 20's / Early 30's / European looking

Aniel — Man (or masculine presenting) / Open Age and Race 

# **Minor Roles**

Village girl (voice only) — 20's/30's. Youthful sounding. One day only.

Senior Banker — 40's-60's. One day only. Small monologue.

# **Contact:**

**For audition materials please email headshots and a full body slate (unlisted Youtube video preferred) to the following email:** helewiseshortfilm@gmail.com

**Subject line:**

[Your name] - [Role(s) you are auditioning for] - Talent

Example:

John Doe - Aniel, Cozzo - Talent

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Helewise Woman Mid to 20's European A good-humoured, headstrong Englishwoman belonging to the peasant class. She is an unwed spinster who has led a life of hardship and meniai labour. As 10 years pass, Helewise grows increasingly cyn,cαι and cantakerous, though we still catch glimpses of the joie de νε that initially drew Cozzo to her'

He has a mischevious streak making habit of squirreling contraban books disavowed by the Catholic Papacy for his personal collection. He expressive and personable, but cn be naive or cowardly on accounto of hisprivileged upbringing.'

sharedPost.text:
Smashed it last night in ADULT BEGINNERS! Quick session, all learned in an hour, drilling out the moves and working on our speed of movement in a faster, more commercial routine. Is it perfection? No! But for an hours hard graft they ROCKED IT! 🥰🙌 And the vibe was insane! 👌

Why not come and join us next time? This class is for anybody, even if you haven’t danced before!! With my guidance you’ll be amazed what you can do! (Details in the comments.) 

#liverpooldance #beginnersdance #liverpoolfitness #Liverpool #starttheweek

sharedPost.text:
COMPLETE BEGINNER? 🤔 TRYING TO FIND YOUR DANCING FEET AGAIN? 

Finding the right dance class is a journey! Some classes are too frantic, some are too boring, many may leave you feeling exhausted and lost, rather than feeling challenged but satisfied. Some instructors are too "cringe" and hyper, while others are very disciplined or dry. 

If you’ve tried starting the journey to find YOUR perfect fit, good for you! 🙌 But if that first try wasn’t quite right, don’t let that stop you from trying again!!

Liverpool is blessed with a ton of fantastic dance instructors and classes. 🥰 But one approach/style doesn’t fit everybody. So if you still have that urge to dance, come and give my classes a try. Great introductory offers to make it easy for you and a lot to gain if it turns out to be your new future-fave! 😉

If you’d like to find out what the classes can do for you, drop me a message! 

Monday 6.30pm - 7.30pm (First class £3, usually £6)

Thursday 7pm - 8pm (First session FREE!! Usually £6) - *Thursdays start back 14th May!! 

#dancemore #positivefeedback #FeelGoodFitness #liverpoollife #scousescene #trysomethingnew #halfprice #FreeClass #MoveMoreFeelBetter #mentalhealthmatters #mentalhealthawareness

sharedPost.text:
SHOWS WANTED!
Do you have a script that encourages change? Do you have a story to tell that makes a difference? Then send it to us!

In August we are putting on Game Changers, an evening of theatre for change. 

If you have a story that discusses important issues, things that need to change or that has voices that need to be heard, please submit it to the link below by the 20th of May. All submissions will be replied to shortly after. 

Scripts must be no longer than 25 mins and have minimal tech/set. More info is provided at the link below. This is a profit share opportunity.

Submit here: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdxoANsWmoGNrCAr-wn49E-7Io4_AQ4aFwilUKUWt5pNouKvw/viewform

Good luck!

items.text:
PAID OPPORTUNITY- MANCHESTER CASTING 

We’re looking for confident actors and actresses based in Yorkshire to feature in social media shoots for a fast-growing viral marketing agency.
( Blank Viral) 

🎬 Paid Opportunities Available

Ideal candidates:

* Comfortable and confident in front of the camera

* Able to deliver natural, engaging performances for short-form content (TikTok, Instagram Reels, etc.)

* Open to creative direction and experimenting with different concepts

This is a great opportunity to build your portfolio, gain exposure, and be part of high-performing viral campaigns.

Interested? Get in touch with your portfolio/showreel and availability.

items.text:
Shamanic, Physical Theatre Workshop - London, 22nd May
Hi All, I'm running KINSHIP - a low-cost day workshop for actors and performers who are interested in learning a shamanic approach to physical theatre and ensemble work. Lots of play, lots of connection, uplifting dance, rhythm exercises and movement-based storytelling.  

Link to Facebook Event:  https://fb.me/e/49UwDbf9X

22nd May, London SE23 - 10:30am - 3:30pm - £25.00. 

To book, please email: ros@rosalindparker.co.uk

COST 25.00 מי Friday, 22nd May, 2026 SDH Space, 9 Havelock Walk, Forest Hill, London, SE23 3HG 10:30am- 3:30 Please note: Some parts of this workshop will be filmed for promotional purposes. to BOK: PLEASE EMAIL ros@rosalindparker.co.uk More info: www.rosalindparker.couk/worksh‎'‎‎

topComments.text: It’s wasting peoples time and your own time  when you don’t put essential details such as gender, role, style, etc

What is the role? The project? How long is the shoot? How much are you paying? These are crucial before people know whether they fit your brief and whether they want to apply..paid can mean anything.. £20/£200/£2000.. people need to know it may be worth their while before applying. Thanks

items.text:
Do majowego odcinka serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję mężczyzny roli:

Menel 1 (40-50) - mocno zaniedbany, pijany/otumaniony, bardziej pasywny (półleży na ławce). 

Data: 05. maja
Stawka: 300 zł netto

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe, TYLKO od osób które nie grały w Gliniarzach w 2026 roku.

Chętnych Panów zapraszam do wysyłania pilnych zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

🚑 Profesjonalne wsparcie medyczne z ROB-Rescue! 🚒
W sytuacjach, gdzie liczy się każda sekunda i najwyższa precyzja, warto postawić na profesjonalistów. ROB-Rescue to zespół doświadczonych ratowników, dla których bezpieczeństwo i życie ludzkie są najwyższym priorytetem.

Sprawdź, w czym możemy Ci pomóc:
🚑 Transport Medyczny (Krajowy i Zagraniczny) – Bezpieczny i komfortowy przewóz pacjentów pod opieką wykwalifikowanego personelu. Działamy na terenie całej Polski oraz Europy!

🪖 Szkolenia z Pierwszej Pomocy + Medycyna Pola Walki – To nie są zwykłe kursy. Uczymy ratowania życia w warunkach ekstremalnych, łącząc klasyczną pierwszą pomoc z elementami ratownictwa pola walki (TCCC).

🛡️ Zabezpieczenie Medyczne Imprez – Gwarantujemy profesjonalną obstawę medyczną podczas eventów, koncertów i zawodów sportowych.

Dlaczego warto nam zaufać? Posiadamy nowoczesny sprzęt, bogate doświadczenie i podejście oparte na praktyce. Nie boimy się trudnych wyzwań – działamy tam, gdzie inni nie dają rady.

🤝 Rozpocznij współpracę z ROB-Rescue!
Potrzebujesz transportu medycznego dla bliskiej osoby? Chcesz przeszkolić swój zespół z procedur, które realnie ratują życie? A może organizujesz event?

📩 Napisz do nas w wiadomości prywatnej! 
📞 Zadzwoń i zapytaj o szczegóły:577911340

Bądź gotowy na wszystko. Wybierz profesjonalizm ROB-Rescue!

#ROBRescue #TransportMedyczny #MedycynaPolaWalki #TCCC #PierwszaPomoc #Ratownictwo #Bezpieczeństwo #ZabezpieczenieMedyczne

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Casting Call Write Up BNU Film Production students are looking for cast in an upcoming film. A post apocalyptic student short film following a girl as she awakes and tries to find her dad, whilst dealing with her uncle keeping a secret and zombies on the prowl. We are looking for actors who fit the following descriptions: Lucy (Playing age around 18) girl who wakes in the apocalypse and is determined to find her father. Must be available on May 8th, May 15th, May 22nd, and May 29th.'

May be an image of text that says 'Jim (Playing age 40s) Former military and current doomsday p person. Lucy's uncle who hides a secret from her. Must be available on May 8th, May 15th, May 22nd, and May 29th. John (Playing age 40s) Lucy's loving father. Must be available on May 15th Zombie (Playing age around 18) A zombie Lucy encounters. Must be available on May 22nd If you are interested email 22308662@bucks.ac.uk This will be unpaid work but transport and food on the shooting days will be covered. Shooting will take place at Buckinghamshire New University's High Wycombe campus.'

items.text:
CASTING CALL - SPANISH ACTRESSES
Hi, I’m Lucia, a Spanish film student in Berlin, planning my upcoming bachelor project, and I’m looking for a two Spanish actresses to collaborate with.

ABOUT THE FILM:

‘Las cosas se mueven en mi casa’ (‘Things are moving in my house’) is a B.A. graduation short film directed by Lucía Gil (www.luciagildp.com). It stems from the feeling of ‘in-betweenness’ that a young Spanish woman feels in Berlin - not fully feeling at home in Germany, but losing the anchor to her Spanish family, as she spends more time apart from them.

ABOUT THE ROLES:

- Abril (main role): 20-28 y/o

- Pilar (Abril’s mother): 50-70 y/o

NATIVE SPANISH IS REQUIRED.

PROJECT INFOS:

Shooting dates: 2-3 days between 1st-11th June

This is a no-budget student film, unpaid. 

Food and drinks will be provided on set, as well as good vibes 🙂

The film will be submitted to festivals.

If you are interested in one of the roles, please text me ! luciagilsuarez@gmail.com or @filmbylusi (ig).🫶🏼

items.text:
## 🎬 CASTING CALL: Political Campaign Commercial
**Filming Dates:** May 1st & May 2nd, 2026
**Location:** Los Angeles Area
**Rate:** $75 (Flat)
We are seeking **authentic, diverse, and grounded** individuals to appear in a series of 30-second campaign commercials. We want real people with "slight imperfections"—no "actor" looks or business suits required.
### **REMAINING ROLES NEEDED:**
 * **[PARENT]**: 30s, young blonde female. Role involves walking a child to school; must convey a natural sense of warmth.
 * **[SMALL BUSINESS OWNER]**: Any gender/ethnicity, ages 30–60. Role involves unlocking a shop and handling state paperwork.
 * **[TECH WORKER/ENGINEER]**: Any ethnicity, 20s–40s. Should look natural in a lab or data center environment. (Wardrobe: Skinny black shirt/casual tech attire).
 * **[ASIAN FAMILY]**: Multi-generational family (Parents/Children) for a dinner table scene.
 * **[TRUCK DRIVER & SPOUSE]**:
   * **Driver:** Black male, 30s–50s.
   * **Spouse:** Latina female, 30s–50s. Scene involves an early morning goodbye at home.
 * **[STUDENTS/LAB WORKERS]**: Ages 18–25. To appear in a high-tech/robotics classroom setting.
 * **[BACKGROUND EXTRAS]**: Diverse group of all ages to represent the community in various "safety" and "opportunity" scenes.
### **PRODUCTION DETAILS:**
 * **Vibe:** Cinematic and natural. We are looking for "real" moments, not staged performances.
 * **Wardrobe:** Normal, everyday clothing (no suits except for lead).
 * **Camera Style:** Slight handheld movement for a grounded, legit look.
**TO APPLY:**
Please send a clear photo and your availability for May 1–2 to [keeler@mcshanellc.com].
*Help us get California moving again!

topComments.text: It would help to state which side of the political aisle the commercial is for

items.text:
CASTING CALL/ "Million Dollar Personality Girl" Short
>>CASTING CALL <<

We are SEEKING an actor with phenomenal range for upcoming ARTISTIC, 1930s based short “MDPG” that is shooting this summer 🎥

AMAZING opportunity to depict the 1930s BLACK HOLLYWOOD LEGEND, in a way never seen before--

BILL “BOJANGLES” ROBINSON 

(40s - 60s, African American, Male)

Legendary tap dancer whose success can’t  protect him from the era’s prejudices.  

CONCEPT:

He has a brief yet insightful conversation discussing black artists navigating 1930s Hollywood, with Jeni Le Gon, the first African American woman to sign a long-term contract with a major studio. 

-------------------------------

--TWO DAY WEEKEND SHOOT, filming this summer, August 2026

--ONE Location

--$450 flat rate/ IMBD Credit/ Meal & Reel

*Bonus if Tap Dancer, very light moves/ routine, this role is more centered for an ACTOR. 

*UNIQUE opportunity to SHINE in this role and demonstrate your ability 

-Location: Los Angeles, CA

-Must be LA-based

-$450 flat rate/ IMBD Credit/ Meal & Reel

-GENRE: DRAMA

-Film dates : August 2026, TBD

.

.

.

Please let me know if you’re interested!🙏🏾✨

.
.

Send Headshot/Resume/Reel to email below, titled “BILL SUBMISSION” in the subject.
.

.

.

NatDorcia94@gmail.com

Any Suggestions/ Recommendations are always greatly appreciated 🎥✨

‼️UWAGA ŚLĄSK – Katowice i okolice‼️ 
🔥Gramy nowy serial kryminalny🔥
  
Szanowni Państwo, serdecznie zapraszamy na plan filmowy. Realizujemy nowy serial dla jednej z ogólnopolskich stacji telewizyjnych!! To nie będzie paradokument, lecz śląska wersja ogólnopolskiego hitu, który ma miliony widzów! Obecnie poszukujemy:

💥MOTOCYKLISTA (20-28 lat) – wysoki, szczupły, krótkie włosy. Może mieć tatuaże, blizny. (prawo jazdy na motocykl będzie dodatkowym atutem 😉)
Data: 04.05 / poniedziałek - 2 sceny (w tym scena otwarcia!) 
Stawka: 300 zł 
/ jeśli posiadasz własny motocykl – zapłacimy Ci za jego udział w scenie extra – stawka do dogadania /

💥KLIENCI BARU (20-60 lat)
Data: 05.05 / wtorek – 1 scena
Stawka: 200 zł
/ zapraszamy więcej osób - mile widziane pary /

💥PANOWIE NA SIŁOWNIE (30-50 lat)
Data: 06.05 / środa 
Stawka: 200 zł – 2 sceny (a do tego bardzo widowiskowe😉)
/ zapraszamy kilku panów /

💥KLIENCI KRĘGIELNI (20-60 lat)
Data: 07.05 / czwartek - 1 scena
Stawka: 200 zł + super zabawa 😉
/ zapraszamy więcej osób - mile widziane pary /

💲Stawki netto (do wypłaty) - płatne gotówką po planie 💲
(Wypełniamy umowę o dzieło)

📩Zgłoszenia: marcin@mascaratmedia.com
W tytule prosimy wpisać nazwę roli do której Państwo się zgłaszają.

📩Zgłoszenie powinno zawierać:
1. Imię i nazwisko + wiek, waga,
2. aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki,
3. miasto zamieszkania,
4. krótkie info o doświadczeniu (+ np. video-wizytówka)
5. oraz oczywiście numer telefonu.

Serdecznie zapraszamy! 🙂🙂🙂

UWAGA: Zgłaszając się do danej roli, jest konieczność zarezerwowania całego dnia, ponieważ "godziny grania" i lokacja są podawane dzień wcześniej. (Oczywiście, wszystko do ustalenia drogą telefoniczną).
PS: Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu i noclegu.

media.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'NOWY SERIAL 手 KRYMINALNY Rozdajemy emy super role! ZAPRASZAMY NA PLAN: 04-08 maja Lista bohąterów w opisie :) Ptatne planie!!! GOTÓWKĄ po'

items.text:
hej,

Rzutem na taśmę przed weekendem :)

Przygotowujemy teledysk dla artysty (nazwę podam na priv). 

Teledysk realizuje reżyser filmowy, więc zachęcam do udziału, na pewno będzie bardzo ładnie. 

Zdjęcia 18.05, Warszawa, 

Nie mamy zwrotów dojazdu niestety

Szukamy:

**Ojciec** - 40/50 lat, look jak z lat 80, chętnie jakiś wąsik /  stawka 750 pln

**Syn** - 7 -10 lat / stawka 500 pln

**Pianista** - wiek nie ma znaczenia, ciekawa uroda, najlepiej charakterystyczny bardzo, może mieć tatuaże na twarzy, nie mieć zęba, nie ma konkretnych wytycznych co do wyglądu, bardziej to, żeby nie bać się mocnego wizerunku. MUSI UMIEĆ ZAGRAĆ NA PIANINIE, więc musi mieć choć podstawy  / stawka 1000 pln

Kibice - około 25 osób, różne, dzieci, dorośli, kobiety, mężczyźni, im ciekawsi tym lepiej, kamera robi przejazd po ich twarzach. / stawka 250 pln

Stawki są już z prowizją.

**Poproszę o wysyłanie zgłoszeń na maila ****[slavic.squad.cast@gmail.com](mailto:slavic.squad.cast@gmail.com)****  do środy 05.5 do godziny 18:00:**

- osoby do ról ojciec, syn pianista - wizytówki na YouTube

- osoby do ról kibiców - wystarczą same zdjęcia twarzy i sylwetki

Proszę żeby zgłoszenie zawierało

- imię nazwisko

- nazwę agencji 

- wiek

- info do jakiej roli się zgłasza

- czy ew wyraża zgodę na statystowanie

W tytule proszę podać IMIE I NAZWISKO + TELEDYSK 

Dobrego weekendu!

items.text:
**Looking for a new type of Acting Class?**

Actors based in or near to Manchester, 

Actor and acting coach Andrew Ellis (This is England, The Walk-In, This is Going to Hurt) is now running weekly acting classes in South Manchester. 

Andy’s classes are different from most! Firstly Andy has over 20 years experience in the industry working with some of the biggest Directors and Actors in the business!

Andy’s classes are proactive, on your feet lessons where **Doing** is the done thing! 

 

Andy is also a keen director and film maker bringing that skill set into the lessons means that each monthly block **You walk away with two showreel style quality scenes! **

All for the bargain price of just £85 for four classes! 

Email [Scene2ScreenMCR@gmail.com](mailto:Scene2ScreenMCR@gmail.com) to book!

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – LIVERPOOL & NORTH WEST (UK)

Feature Film: One Man’s Land

📖 ABOUT THE FILM

One Man’s Land follows Harry, a disgraced war veteran returning home after serving time for war crimes committed during his final tour in Afghanistan.

He struggles to rebuild his life in a place that no longer feels familiar. His father is in prison, his mother has passed and his sister wants nothing to do with him. When he reconnects with an old comrade, Ken, he is drawn into a fringe far-right political movement that feeds his anger and disillusionment.

At the same time, Harry forms a fragile connection with Ruth, one of the few people who sees beyond his past.

Despite his best efforts to balance his personal feelings and his distorted views, Harry’s decisions lead him down a path of no return.

🎥 PROJECT DETAILS

• Feature film (low-budget, high-quality production)
• Flexible shoot schedule across multiple months
• Filming in Merseyside
• Non-union project
• Paid roles (flat fee, negotiated)
• Professional crew using industry-standard equipment

🎬 Auditions: May
📍 SAE Institute, Georgia House, Pall Mall, Liverpool L3 6AL
🚆 Nearest station: Moorfields

⚠️ Important
This film includes mature themes and strong language, including racist rhetoric reflective of certain characters.

🎭 ROLES

HARRY (Mid 30s – Early 40s)
North-West accent. Former Afghan veteran. Physically fit, rough around the edges. Quiet but volatile.
Lead role with strong emotional range.
⚠️ Includes two scenes involving kissing (a peck and a brief intimate moment). An intimacy coordinator will be present.

RUTH (Mid 30s – Early 40s)
North-West accent. Barmaid with a hidden past. Warm, likeable, emotionally guarded.
⚠️ Includes two scenes involving kissing (a peck and a brief intimate moment). An intimacy coordinator will be present.

LAURA (Late 20s – Early 30s)
North-West accent. Harry’s ex. Direct, hardened, not interested in reconnecting.

BARB (Mid – Late 50s)
North-West accent. Reclusive mother grieving her son. Approx. 1 shoot day.

PETE GOLD (Late 40s – Mid 50s)
British accent. Charismatic but manipulative far-right leader.
⚠️ Contains inflammatory dialogue reflective of the character.

ALICE (Early – Mid 20s)
North-West accent. Harry’s sister. Caring but distant. Has moved on.

DR AVERY (Mid 30s+)
Preferably female. Court-appointed therapist. Professional, empathetic.

📌 REQUIREMENTS
• Headshot
• Showreel

📩 Apply: onemanslandfilm@gmail.com

🎭 ROLES

HARRY (Mid 30s – Early 40s)
North-West accent. Former Afghan veteran. Physically fit, rough around the edges. Quiet but volatile.
Lead role with strong emotional range.
⚠️ Includes two scenes involving kissing (a peck and a brief intimate moment). An intimacy coordinator will be present.

RUTH (Mid 30s – Early 40s)
North-West accent. Barmaid with a hidden past. Warm, likeable, emotionally guarded.
⚠️ Includes two scenes involving kissing (a peck and a brief intimate moment). An intimacy coordinator will be present.

LAURA (Late 20s – Early 30s)
North-West accent. Harry’s ex. Direct, hardened, not interested in reconnecting.

BARB (Mid – Late 50s)
North-West accent. Reclusive mother grieving her son. Approx. 1 shoot day.

PETE GOLD (Late 40s – Mid 50s)
British accent. Charismatic but manipulative far-right leader.
⚠️ Contains inflammatory dialogue reflective of the character.

ALICE (Early – Mid 20s)
North-West accent. Harry’s sister. Caring but distant. Has moved on.

DR AVERY (Mid 30s+)
Preferably female. Court-appointed therapist. Professional, empathetic.

📌 REQUIREMENTS
• Headshot
• Showreel

📩 Apply: onemanslandfilm@gmail.com

items.text:
URGENT CASTING CALL

Purple Dreams Productions are casting the lead character in our upcoming play.

‘MURDER AT…’
There’s a killer in the cast! Comedy turns to tragedy as a murderer reveals themselves… but who will be their first victim?

This play is a psychological drama, based around a cast of actors as they put on a series of plays at their local theatre. 

We have 2 booked dates locked in at different venues, with the potential for more as new bookings come in.

29th May - Murder at the Quay Theatre
13th June - Murder at Cheltenham Playhouse

We’ve previously toured this play in Brentwood, Faversham, Lowestoft, Sittingbourne, Wickenby, Thame and Sleaford to great responses, and are looking forward to taking it to new audiences. 

Rehearsals will take place in Hunstanton (PE36) and will be as flexible as possible to work around previous commitments.

If you’re interested in joining our warm and friendly group, please don’t hesitate to get in touch. Contact me via a DM on here, or at purple-dreams@hotmail.co.uk 

Many thanks 
Tobias Nicholls 
Creative Director 
Purple Dreams Productions

items.text:
Hey everyone!
My name is Sophie and I’m casting for an upcoming indie horror film and looking for two female main characters! 

I am looking for: 

Diane 

- 19-25 age range 

- Ambitious carer character 

- Any appearance welcomed 

- Happy for SFX makeup to be applied 🙂 

Franny

- 19-25 age range 

- Agoraphobic young adult character 

- Any appearance welcomed 

- Happy for SFX makeup to be applied 🙂 

Looking for actresses who would be available within the next few weeks to shoot! On some evenings and in the days! 

I’m looking for people around Colchester/Essex/Elmstead Market! 

Unfortunately, this project has no budget and is a indie collaboration project, therefore only suits actresses who are looking for showreel footage/experience, sorry 😞

It’ll be a really fun horror project, with a hope to submit to festivals! 

Please email sophiebrock3@hotmail.com for more info about the project and with a headshot of yours! 

Thanks again guys!! :)

Truly grateful to have worked with so many wonderful people on such an important film, and so glad it’s landing with so many. Hoping it continues to spark conversation and helps others through their own lived experiences. Keep the message alive and S.H.A.R.E. ☮️💛

CASTING CALL ⭐️
Looking for friend group aged 18+ to 30

We’re ideally looking for groups of 5 friends who would enjoy taking part together

TRAIN BRAND AD

PAID

BSF: £350 per day 

Featured Buyout: £2,500

1x day shoot

Shoot window: 18-21 May 2026

Filming locations: Liverpool, Edinburgh, York & Manchester 

To apply, please email vickiloucasting@gmail.com with names, photos, location & short written intro

📩 Subject: Friend Group

Thank you!

items.text:
** Limited Actor + Model Headshot Sessions (Downtown LA – First Come First Serve)**

We’re opening up a very limited set of professional headshot sessions designed specifically for actors, models, and creatives looking to update their portfolio, casting profiles, and branding images.

This is part of our community's mission to **make professional creative resources more accessible to underserved and emerging talent**, while still maintaining industry-level quality.

First come, first serve — we will reach out directly to confirmed applicants
Date: Tentatively Friday (final confirmation pending)

** SESSION OPTIONS**

** $50 — Quick Refresh**
• 15 minutes
• 1 look
• 1–2 edited images
•* 2 slots available *

**$100 — Standard Headshot (Most Recommended)**
• 30 minutes
• 1 look
• 2–4 edited images

*4 slots available *

 **$200 — Professional Session**
• 60 minutes
• 1 look
• 5–7 edited images

*3 slots available *

 **$300 — Premium Session**
• 60 minutes
• 2 looks
• Full guided shoot experience
• 6–10 edited images

*1 slots available *

**Only 10 slots available this round!**

**HOW TO BOOK**

**Comment below with:**
1. **Your name**
2. **The tier you’re interested in ($50 / $100 / $200 / $300)**
3. **Your availability for Friday**

**We will review responses and reach out directly to confirm time slots.**

items.text:
👗 **FITTING MODEL WANTED – Size 38** 👗
📍 Berlin-Charlottenburg

You’re a size 38 and curious what really happens behind the scenes of a fashion brand?
Join our fitting sessions and be part of how our collections come to life. 🙌✨

✨ **What you’ll do**
• Try on new styles together with our product team 👚
• Give honest feedback on fit, comfort & feel 💬
• Help us perfect our collections before launch 🎯
→ No shootings, no runway – just real product work 🚫📸

📏 **Your measurements (approx.)**
• Height: 168 cm (±4 cm)
• Bust: 88 cm (±2 cm)
• Waist: 73 cm (±2 cm)
• Hips: 98 cm (±2 cm)

🕒 **The setup**
• 2x per week, approx. 3h per session ⏰
• Monday–Friday (daytime) 📅
• Freelance, mini-job or working student 💼

📩 **How to apply**
Send an email to job@legerbylenagercke.com with:
1️⃣ Photos (front / side / back) in fitted top & leggings 📸
2️⃣ Your current measurements 📐
3️⃣ A few lines about yourself & your availability ✍️

🔗 [https://www.legerbylenagercke.com/pages/karriere](https://www.legerbylenagercke.com/pages/karriere)
items.previewDescription: LeGer by Lena Gercke is a Berlin-based fashion brand that empowers women through fashion and builds an inspiring and supportive community.

sharedPost.text:
🎧 10.000 Downloads – ich bin überwältigt!
Was für ein Meilenstein! 🎉 Mein Podcast für Gesang & Stimme hat 10.000 Downloads erreicht – und das verdanke ich euch. Danke, danke, danke! 🙏
Im Podcast dreht sich alles rund ums Singen:
🎙️ Atmung & Stimmklang
🎵 Gesangstechnik für alle Level
🧠 Wissen aus der Stimmwissenschaft
🎤 Bühnenpräsenz & Ausdruck
✨ Impulse für deinen Übungsalltag
Egal ob du gerade erst anfängst oder schon lange singst – hier ist für jeden etwas dabei! Alle 2 Monate gibt es eine neue Folge mit frischer Inspiration. 🌟
Du findest den Podcast auf:
🟢 Spotify
🍎 Apple Podcasts
🎵 Deezer
📖 Audible
📺 RTL+
👉 Unter Linktree in der Bio oder direkt unter www.singasong-behappy.de/podcast-fur-gesang-und-stimme
Sing A Song – Be Happy! 🎶
Deine Bernadette 😊
#podcast #gesangspodcast #stimme #singen #gesang #singenlernen #gesangsunterricht #gesangsunterrichtberlin #stimmbildung #vocal #spotify #applepodcasts #10000downloads #meilenstein #singasongbehappy #musikpodcast #gesangstipps #stimmtraining #berlin #onlinekurs

🎥 In diesem Reel lädt Michael Weilguny zum 168. KBF ein! 

👉 Sei dabei beim nächsten KBF! ✨☕️ 

📍 168. Künstler*innen Business Frühstück 
🗓️ Dienstag, 28.04.2026 – 7:15 Uhr 
🏨 Hotel Zeitgeist Vienna, Sonnwendgasse 15, 1100 Wien 

🎤 Vortrag: Mag. Barbara Fahringer-Postl 
🎙️ Moderation: Michael Weilguny 

Tipps und Tricks bei Künstler*innen-Besteuerung

sharedPost.text:
🎥 In diesem Reel lädt Michael Weilguny zum 168. KBF ein! 

👉 Sei dabei beim nächsten KBF! ✨☕️ 

📍 168. Künstler*innen Business Frühstück 
🗓️ Dienstag, 28.04.2026 – 7:15 Uhr 
🏨 Hotel Zeitgeist Vienna, Sonnwendgasse 15, 1100 Wien 

🎤 Vortrag: Mag. Barbara Fahringer-Postl 
🎙️ Moderation: Michael Weilguny 

Tipps und Tricks bei Künstler*innen-Besteuerung 

Welche steuerlichen Besonderheiten gelten für Künstler*innen? Wo lassen sich Kosten absetzen, welche Aufzeichnungen sind Pflicht, und wie wirkt sich die Sozialversicherung aus? 

Steuerberaterin und Wirtschaftsprüferin Mag. Barbara Fahringer-Postl, Partnerin der BDO GmbH, gibt praxisnahe Einblicke in Einkommensteuer, Betriebsausgaben, Umsatzsteuer und Co. — mit vielen wertvollen Tipps speziell für die kreative Praxis. 

Ein Frühstück für alle, die im Kunst- und Kulturbereich tätig sind und ihre steuerlichen Grundlagen besser verstehen oder optimieren möchten. 

© privat 

📲 Mehr Infos: www.KünstlerBusinessFrühstück.at 
und https://fb.me/e/6KqWp3MQS 

#künstlerinnenbusinessfrühstück #kbf #zeitgeistvienna #künstlerinnen #kunstundkultur #besteuerung #steuerberatung #selbständig #freischaffend #kreativwirtschaft #kulturbranche #wien #netzwerken

Hey! I’m a student filmmaker in Lethbridge working on a short horror/thriller film 🎬
Looking for 1 male actor (18–25)

No acting experience needed at all

• Short shoot (1–2 evenings max)

• Super chill project

• Great if you’ve ever wanted to try acting

If you’re interested or even a little curious, just comment or DM me 👍

My email for enquires - pablajaskeerat13@gmail.com

items.text:
URGENT CASTING: Talent with REAL golf skills for Major Retail Brand Spot
Shoot Date: 5/3–5/6 (TBD how many days based on role.)

Location: Los Angeles, CA

Rate: $500 x Day + $2,000 usage

Non-union

GOLFER (Male)

Ages (26-38)

Preferably Caucasian

Height: 5’10-6'2

Size: M/L

We’re specifically looking for talent with golf skills, as golf performance will be featured in the spot. The campaign will run across broadcast, streaming, social, and will also include a photography component.

If you’re interested send self tapes of your driving swing & a putt, any portfolio images you may have full body & headshots. As well your sizing (Shirt M/L, Waist/inseam, shoe size, height & weight.) Email: allison.trimbell.dcsg@gmail.com

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of golf and text that says 'ATHLETE:6'2" ATHLETE: 6'2" SIZE: SIZE:MEDIUM MEDIUM'

items.text:
CASTING CALL (Seattle, WA)

Dates: May 9 and 10 (Seattle, WA)

Character Details:

ADAM (13-18) - Adam puts all his trust into his sister, but when asked to lie, his morals cause him to question her.

Film Synopsis:

"Falling Out" - Two siblings get into a fight caused by a cramped fallout bunker, lack of food, and a mysterious voice on a radio.

To Apply: 

Please send your headshot, name/age, and short video of you acting (monologue or reel) to Jmajosephson@gmail.com

Filming will take place in South Seattle on May 9 and 10 (all transportation costs will be reimbursed).  Please Note: This is a non-union student film.

Please let me know any questions or if you're interested!

Contact: Jmajosephson@gmail.com

items.text:
**CASTING CALL - CINEMATIC ARTS PROD 3 PHANTOM PAIN**

*Synopsis: After bodybuilder, Javier, breaks his arm and has to have it amputated, The Arm crawls off on a journey of its own, and after some searching, finds and attaches to Ronnie. Javier, still able to feel the arm moving, tries everything he can to either get The Arm back or move past it so he can compete to be the Juiciest Man Around. Eventually, after failing in every aspect and seeing The Arm thrive with Ronnie, Javier realizes he has to feel in order to heal. *

We are in dire need of extras this coming Friday morning to help us with our speed-dating scene. If you have availability and would be able to come help us out, it would be greatly appreciated. We are filming in the Denver area.

Attached is a google form to fill out if you're available so we will be able to send you more information and a call sheet on the day of.

We really hope to see you on set!!

[[https://forms.gle/Loi1uJ856GBhyDcZ6](https://forms.gle/Loi1uJ856GBhyDcZ6)](https://forms.gle/Loi1uJ856GBhyDcZ6)

items.text:
Casting for new talent
Hi, I am starting a video/filmmaking business and putting together COMEDY samples for Youtube and to promote the business.

I need actors, comedians for a few simple scenes.  No experience required (although helpful).  Must be professional and reliable. 

1. To play a wild pharmacist.  Male or female talent.  Ages 25-45 Should be corporate looking with an edge, such as wild hair, tattoos, etc.   
2. To play a comedy Lucifer character.  Male or female.  Prefer age 30-50  The wilder looking and more evil you can appear, the better.  Must have a sense of humor.

I will probably need 20-40 minutes of your time.  This is a great way to get some experience and start your acting career.

No pay, but you will get copy of the video, stills photos, credit and experience.

You can email a few photos and information to 1allancastle@gmail.com  

Thank you.  Allan

items.title: Casting for new talent

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – Between Two Lives
An Independent Short Film

A Solkem Studios Film

        Hello,

I’m currently casting for my upcoming short film Between Two Lives, a character-driven story exploring identity, growth, and the tension between past and future. This is my second film project, and I’m looking for actors who are passionate about storytelling and want to collaborate on a meaningful project.

      MARCUS (Supporting Role)

Male, mids–late 20s

Charismatic, outgoing, natural comedic presence

Represents comfort and familiarity in Jordan’s lifestyle

Strong in group scenes and natural dialogue delivery

  ANDRE (Supporting Role)

Male, mid–late 20s

Calm, grounded, observant presence

Delivers lines with subtle emotional depth

Represents clarity and truth within the friend group

📍 Filming Location: Aurora & Denver, Colorado

📅 Shoot Dates: July 10–12, 2026

🎬 Production: Independent Film

💰 Compensation: Will provide food/snack/Drinks: This is an unpaid project, created for:

🎥 Credit:

On-screen credit

IMDb credit

Copy of the final film for your reel

📩 To Submit:

Headshot

Reel or past work (if available)

Contact information

📧 Email: reinesolkem101@gmail.com

📱 Phone: 720-572-0029

Looking for actors who are serious, reliable, and excited to help bring a strong story to life.

items.text:
Dark Theatre Rochdale ·  St Aidan's Church Hall ·  29–31 October 2026 

Dracula: A Feminist Revenge Fantasy, Really takes Kate Hamill's incendiary new play and puts it in the hands of Dark Theatre Rochdale for the UK Amateur Premiere. This is Dracula as a satirical dissection — the monster is not the fangs. 
The monster is entitlement, grooming, and the casual exercise of power over other people. 
He is charming. You would like him. That is the point.
The women of this story were always the most intelligent people in the room. 
This time, they get the ending they earned.

🎭 Auditions on 30/31 May by appointment 
Register now, for a guaranteed slot!!
 https://tinyurl.com/DraculaAudition

“DRACULA” is presented through special arrangement with and all authorised performance materials are supplied by TRW PLAYS www.trwplays.co.uk

#DarkTheatreRochdale #Dracula2026 #FeministTheatre #UKAmateurPremiere #Auditions

sharedPost.text:
Dark Theatre Rochdale ·  St Aidan's Church Hall ·  29–31 October 2026 

📖 You know the story. 
A vampire arrives in England. 
Women start acting strangely. 
Men scramble to save them.

You think you know how it ends, but you've been reading the wrong version.

Dracula: A Feminist Revenge Fantasy, Really takes Kate Hamill's incendiary new play and puts it in the hands of Dark Theatre Rochdale for the UK Amateur Premiere. This is Dracula as a satirical dissection — the monster is not the fangs. 
The monster is entitlement, grooming, and the casual exercise of power over other people. 
He is charming. You would like him. That is the point.
The women of this story were always the most intelligent people in the room. 
This time, they get the ending they earned.

Dark Theatre Rochdale is the first amateur company in the United Kingdom to perform Kate Hamill's Dracula: A Feminist Revenge Fantasy, Really. 
Kate Hamill is one of America's most celebrated theatre writers — her feminist adaptations of classic texts have been performed at major venues across the US and UK. 

This is the UK amateur premiere.

🎭 Auditions on 30/31 May by appointment 
Register now, for a guaranteed slot!!

🔗 LINK IN BIO

CONTENT WARNING
Dracula: A Feminist Revenge Fantasy, Really contains: stage combat and stage blood, simulated physical violence, themes of coercive control and sexual predation, themes of self-harm, adult language, fog effects, and sudden loud sounds.
All intimacy and combat is professionally choreographed. 
A Wellbeing and Intimacy Associate is present at all performances.
Suitable for ages 14+. 
Under 16s should be accompanied by an adult

“DRACULA” is presented through special arrangement with and all authorised performance materials are supplied by TRW PLAYS www.trwplays.co.uk

#DarkTheatreRochdale #Dracula2026 #FeministTheatre #UKAmateurPremiere #Auditions

items.text:
**CHEKHOV WORLD THEATRE Summer Academy **

**July 12-18, 2026** in Hamburg 

**Michael Chekhov Acting Technique** meets

- **Organic Breathing** & **Image Work**

- **Kutiyattam Traditional Sanskrit Theatre** (Kerala, India) 

- **Physical Theatre and Dance** (Southeast Asia, India, Turkey) 

- **The Actor’s Energy and Presence **

- **Intercultural Theatre** in East Asia, India, Africa, and Europe 

Faculty: **Jesper Michelsen**, Denmark; **Remith Ramesh**, India; **Gülhan Kadim**, Turkey; **Yiğit Sertdemir**, Turkey; **Suzana Nikolić**, Croatia; **Ulrich Meyer-Horsch**, Germany; and guest artists from Southern Africa, USA, Singapore, and India 

**TRAINING for PERFORMERS **

This annual intercultural encounter brings performance and training approaches from different continents and backgrounds into a practical exchange. You will intensively study the Michael Chekhov Acting Technique, and at the same time you will be in dialogue with other artistic traditions and performance techniques from around the globe. 

**INTERNATIONAL FESTIVAL**

There will be various workshop tracks in the morning and afternoon, followed by showcases, festival events and open classes in the evening. The daily training sessions can be combined so you will get a sense of each of the offered forms. 

The Summer Academy 2026 includes Michael Chekhov Europe’s Training Module 1: Making Contact: Living Images 

Full announcement incl. application: https://sfsh.de/international-summer-academy/sfsh10042/

Further information: chekhov@sfsh.de

items.text:
Weekly Wins!

Come on then, what’s been your little victory this week? 🎬

Maybe you landed an audition, nailed a self-tape, finally updated your headshots, or just made it through Monday without swearing at the universe.

Big or small, every win counts, drop yours in the comments and let’s give each other a bit of well earned applause. 👏🎬🇬🇧

topComments.text: I accidentally got myself an audition for a big feature film. I did OK too so fingers crossed 🤞

My son was in a short film, filmed in the beautiful countryside.  He has a disability & holds the bannister on stairs. He walked up a 400meter hill, steep path without a rail for filming, had to go down part way & up again a few times for different scenes. He had an amazing experience. I ask him to do the dishwasher, he’s says he’s tired. He worked long days often not getting back to the accommodation until 10 & didn’t complain about being tired once!

Talent agency looking for talent.

MIXED-RACE YOUNG GIRL, AGE 4-5
Darker-skinned Latina or lighter-skinned African American

 Rate Details

Full Rate Details:

Session: $550/day - Booked on a 12-hour day plus lunch. 
Usage: $2500

items.text:
Sharing a workshop for Theatre Makers - part of Practice Lab by PROJEKT EUROPA at Chisenhale Dance Space in London! Only a £5 contribution required! Bookings on the website: https://www.projekteuropa.org/lab

**13 May 2026 - 18:00-20:00**

**Who Am I When I’m Hacked? - A Creative Exploration of Social Media Identity led by Laura Mottola**

This creative workshop is a devising lab exploring the intersection of social media and identity. We will creatively explore a common and deeply personal experience: having your social media account hacked. The aim is to expose how intimately tied our digital presence is to our sense of self, and what happens when that identity is taken from us.

We will explore the emotional and psychological impact of losing control over our social media identity. Through guided discussion, improvisation, and collaborative devising, we’ll examine the blurred line between who we are and who we present ourselves to be online, and what’s at stake when that version is stolen. Being hacked is intimate. It's an invasion without fingerprints. It’s someone wearing your face and speaking in your voice. A contemporary tragedy with WiFi. We scroll. We curate. We perform. But who performs when we lose the account?

Join Laura to play at the edge of authorship and identity!

(Disclaimer**: **This workshop explores themes Laura is developing for a new performance work. The session is a research and devising lab, not a content extraction session. It is a collaborative exploration and any personal stories, text or movement generated remain the property of their creators).

items.text:
Please join me on Wednesday, May 20, 2026 from 3:30 to 6:00 for Women in Film & Video New England
monthly meeting where I will be holding an Open Call for Actors!

I am currently casting Non-Union Actors and Real People in a series of PSA’s for a Nonprofit Healthcare Organization.

I am looking for a wide variety of people from all walks of life 18+!

I will also be happy to see Union actors and make sure I have them in my database!!

I offer “boutique” casting services to my clients.  I do all the casting personally.

I am an actor and director and establishing relationships with actors and directors is very important to me.

Seeing an actor in person is so important and I am excited to have this opportunity!!

See you there!!

Big Thanks to Tai Bacani for welcoming me!! 

🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉

✨BIG NEWS, FILM FRIENDS ✨

We’re switching things up for our next WIFVNE Brew Networking Night… and you are going to LOVE it.

📍 New Location: Shannon View Inn
🍻 Same amazing community
🎬 Even MORE opportunity

We are SO excited to share that Jodi Purdy Casting Director will be joining us LIVE for an in-person open call for actors 🎭

Yes… you read that right.
Come ready. Come confident. Come as YOU.

Whether you’re an actor, filmmaker, writer, or just looking to connect with creative, like-minded people—this is your night.

Let’s build, collaborate, and create magic together 💫

CASTING CALL | RUNNERS | S27

We’re casting runners for a photo + video shoot for a major running brand. We need intermediate, advanced, and elite runners age 18+ across all identities. Experience with road running and good running form required. 

Pay is $2,000 for 1 day of work in New York, NY between Thu 5/28 - Wed 6/3 (1 day, TBD) with a fitting on Wed 5/27 or Tue 6/2. Must be 18+ and live in NY. Must disclose your talent agency if applicable. The advertiser’s name will be disclosed prior to booking if you are offered a role. 

We are also casting extras for this project! We need people ages 18-70 across all identities, pay is $500/day. See link for more info! 

TO APPLY:  https://www.weeblemountain.com/opencastingcalls/s27-runners

DON’T FIT THIS ROLE? Sign up for general consideration at https://weeblemountain.com/signup | We specialize in real people casting.

items.text:
3 SPACES LEFT! 

MAY WORKSHOP – LIMITED PLACES 

DEVISING: CHARACTER → STORY → PERFORMANCE

Saturday 9th May | 2–5pm
The Crescent Theatre, Birmingham

This isn’t just about “coming up with ideas” — it’s about bringing characters to life and getting them on their feet.

In this practical, high-energy session, we’ll:
• Build bold, instinctive characters through improvisation
• Explore relationships, dynamics, and playable choices
• Turn raw ideas into scenes that actually work on stage
• Discover story through action — not overthinking
• Work as an ensemble to create something spontaneous, surprising, and performable

Come with a character, a line, or absolutely nothing — we’ll create everything from scratch in the room.

This is about doing, playing, and taking risks — not sitting around talking about ideas.

Perfect for actors who want to stretch themselves, trust their instincts, and create original work

£38 | Places are limited

 Message or email to book: estherstanford@icloud.com

www.estherstanford.co.uk 

#actingworkshop #birminghamactors #devising #actortraining #actingclass

items.summary:
3 SPACES LEFT! 

MAY WORKSHOP – LIMITED PLACES 

DEVISING: CHARACTER → STORY → PERFORMANCE

Saturday 9th May | 2–5pm
The Crescent Theatre, Birmingham

This isn’t just about “coming up with ideas” — it’s about bringing characters to life and getting them on their feet.

In this practical, high-energy session, we’ll:
• Build bold, instinctive characters through improvisation
• Explore relationships, dynamics, and playable choices
• Turn raw ideas into scenes that actually work on stage
• Discover story through action — not overthinking
• Work as an ensemble to create something spontaneous, surprising, and performable

Come with a character, a line, or absolutely nothing — we’ll create everything from scratch in the room.

This is about doing, playing, and taking risks — not sitting around talking about ideas.

Perfect for actors who want to stretch themselves, trust their instincts, and create original work

£38 | Places are limited

 Message or email to book: estherstanford@icloud.com

www.estherstanford.co.uk 

#actingworkshop #birminghamactors #devising #actortraining #actingclass

sharedPost.text:
Extravaganza Productions Ltd are seeking a MALE SINGER to play EMPEROR OF CHINA in ‘ALADDIN’ at the MIDDLESBROUGH THEATRE 2026.

RIchard Chandler (CastingDirector)

Please submit APPLICATIONS to:
extravagana@panto-mime.co.uk

Der Kino Mittwoch auf radioYpsilon 

MOVIETIME KW 18/2026

DIE INTRIGANTE GLAMOURWELT DER MODE, AUTORIN ENID BLYTON WIEDER IM KINO UND 2 INTERESSANTE INTERVIEWS 

Vor genau 20 Jahren setzten Meryl Streep und Anne Hathaway neue Masstäbe in Sachen Glanz, Luxus aber auch Machtkämpfe. Nun kehren die beiden inkl neuer Charaktere zurück in DER TEUFEL TRÄGT PRADA 2.

Die Bücher der britischen Kinderbuchautorin wurden schon mehrmals verfilmt, nun erlebt ein weiterer Roman von ihr seine Kinopremiere, DER WUNDERWELTENBAUM.

Seit Jahren ist er einer der bekanntesten Dok Filmer des Landes, Georg Riha. Nun startet sein neuestes Werk in den Kinos. Sie lebt im schönen Weinviertel und hat u.a. schon mehrere Videos für die Feuerwehr gemacht,  Sonja Balazs. Mit beiden konnte Moderatorin Sarah Fuchs ein Gespräch führen. 

Musikalisch gibts diesmal ein best of der bekanntesten Filmsongs der letzten 80 Jahre. 

Mittwoch 29.4.2026 von 18 bis 19h auf radioYpsilon 94.5 oder via Stream (http://mp3.radioypsilon.at:8000/)

items.text:
# **JOIN OUR ENTERTAINMENT TEAM AT HERTFORDSHIRE ZOO THIS JUNE!🦁**

Ready to bring the energy this summer and entertain thousands of guests? We’re looking for bold, lively and confident performers to join our Entertainment Team at Hertfordshire Zoo for our Summer Evenings event this June.

This year we’re bringing the fiesta to the zoo with a vibrant Mexican theme for the event and it’s sure to be a big party full of colour, music and general vibes.

As part of the entertainment team, you’ll be out and about across the zoo, bringing the atmosphere to life with walkaround entertainment and pop up interactions. You’ll play a key role in creating magical summer nights for families and visitors of all ages.

**What we’re looking for:**
* Big energy and isn’t afraid to be a bit silly
* Someone who enjoys interacting with families and making people smile
* A reliable individual who is positive and ready to get stuck in
* Someone who wants to have the best fun ever
* Previous performing experience is preferable but not essential

**When you’ll work:**
* Saturday 30th May (approx. 5:30pm - 9:30pm)
* Saturday 6th June (approx. 5:30pm - 9:30pm)
* Saturday 13th June (approx. 5:30pm - 9:30pm)
* Friday 19th June (approx. 5:30pm - 9:30pm)
* Saturday 20th June (approx. 5:30pm - 9:30pm)
* Saturday 27th June (approx. 5:30pm - 9:30pm)

**PLEASE NOTE -** You are not required to be available to work on all of these dates. Any availability is accepted.

**Rate of Pay - **£14.00 per hour

To apply for the role, or for more information, please email **entertainment@hertfordshirezoo.com**

items.text:
Looking for an elderly 70-80 year old man to play the role of Grandpa Nick. He should have a look similar to of Robert De Niro- good physic, olive skin, a Mediterranean / Greek look. Very ethnic look. This role does not have any dialogue and would be to shoot one short scene.

scene. 

Also looking to cast a couple female actresses in the 30-40 age range to be background actors in one short scene. 

Synopsis:

Unforgettable is a story of a woman’s desperate attempt to get pregnant and on her journey, gets an unexpected message from her beloved Grandfather from the afterlife.

And how the signs along the way of her journey, whispered to her, what gifts would be put in her path. A true story of one woman’s synchronicity and love. 

PLEASE NOTE: this is a student film, it is no pay but all actors will receive IMDb credits. 

FILMING IN THE LOS ANGELES AREA.

**Mroczne sesje**

 

Poszukuje kobiet w **wieku od 18**, górna granica nie ma znaczenia. Wykonuje sesje w stylu mrocznym wykorzystując różne gadżety i kostiumy. Szukam kobiet ,które nie boją się własnego ciała. Doświadczenie nie jest tu ważne.

Osoba zainteresowana powinna najlepiej mieszkać **w Gliwicach** lub okolicach ( Zabrze, Katowice chyba, że ktoś jest bardzo zainteresowany i mieszka dalej to też ok. z tym,że nie zwracam za bilety.) tak aby dojazd był krótki dla niej. Sesje wykonuje tylko w Gliwicach. Po sesji i obrobieniu zdjęć, zostaną one wysłane modelce do jej wykorzystania. **Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne**, umowa na zasadzie **TFP**

items.text:
Do majowego odcinka serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję mężczyzny roli:

Menel 1 (40-50) - mocno zaniedbany, pijany/otumaniony, bardziej pasywny (półleży na ławce). 

Data: 05. maja
Stawka: 300 zł netto

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe, TYLKO od osób które nie grały w Gliniarzach w 2026 roku.

Chętnych Panów zapraszam do wysyłania pilnych zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

items.text:
Hi everyone! I’m a colombian actress in Denver looking to build a creative crew for consistent, high-quality content in English and Spanish.

I’ve written and produced several shorts on my own that have gained some **interest on social media**, but I want to team up with others to level up our production value.

This is a **collaborative passion project, **the goal is to create professional scenes/shorts in **one-day shoots** to grow our reels, gain recognition, and eventually pitch larger funded projects together. **Students are more than welcome!**

**Interested? Please drop a comment with:**
1. What role you’d play (Writer, DP, Editor, Actor, etc.)
2. A quick note on your experience or a link to your work.

**I'd love to create something together!** ✨

topComments.text: I would love to collaborate. I am an actress in theater and exploring more film work. I'm also a singer, and have performing and modeling experience as well. My Spanish accent apparently is very good as I was mistaken for a Peruvian before.

Hello, this sounds like fun.  Im a writer, director, sound mixer, actor. 

I am a student at CCA Film School been on a ton of studen films behind the camera as well as acting in front. Plus doing internships with production companies here in Denver too.

Casting call and interest 
I know by looking at this picture, you all are like "What the hell" . Well I decided to write a comedy short so I can enter it into some festivals or maybe make it a web series. Looking to film this late September, but want to get the cast rolling . My two dicks ( Private Eyes )  are cast but looking for someone that can play a slapstick drunk, a couple that has great chemistry in arguing. 
And need about three or four extras as well. Will be a two or three night shoot. Food, reel and credit will be incorporated. This is a comedy , so let's have fun!
Email crawfordraun@gmail.com, attn : The two dicks picture
Send head shots and a small comedy reel or just a reel of yourself  to email above
Have all costumes for the roles and have the convenience store ready as well. This is going to be a blast !!

items.text:
🎭 Question for actors ready to build a working career (not just train)?
Hi everyone, my name is Freya Tingley. I’m an actress who has worked on international film and television projects, including two Netflix series. I starred in Jersey Boys (directed by Clint Eastwood) and played Wendy Darling on Once Upon a Time.

I’ve been so grateful for the wave of interest and messages recently. It’s been amazing connecting with so many of you.

I’m now offering something I wish existed when I was starting out:

A 2-hour, 1:1 career mentorship session over Zoom.

One of the biggest frustrations I hear is this:
Actors are told “get an agent” but then once they have one, nothing happens.
And for many actors, the challenge is figuring out how to get an agent in the first place.

This session is designed for both.

We sit down and go through:
• What actually makes an actor book work (beyond just talent)
• How to position yourself to attract the right representation
• What to focus on if you don’t yet have an agent
• The materials you really need and what most actors get wrong
• How to approach auditions and self-tapes strategically
• Building a career that moves forward, not just sideways

You’ll leave with a clear, actionable plan so you’re not stuck wondering when the next audition is coming or why you’re not booking. You’ll know exactly what steps to take to create the career you want. 

If you’ve been feeling stuck or unsure, feel free to message me for details or to book.

Casting for a new short film.

Velvet Waltz is co-producing a highly stylised low-budget short with a local filmmaker. Working title: **MOCKTAIL**.

Set across one cocktail bar scene, the film explores **perception vs reality** through movement, tension and atmosphere.

**Shooting in Manchester this summer. One-day shoot.**

Looking for the following roles:
* Female, 25–35 playing age — calm, controlled presence
* Female, 25–35 playing age — slim / avant garde / bohemian energy
* Male, 25–35 playing age
* Female, 30s playing age — glamour model type look
* Male, 30–40s playing age — built / muscular presence
* Male, 25–35 playing age (2 roles, one South Asian preferred)
* Male, 50s playing age — someone holding onto youth

Intentionally super low budget. Intentionally high style.

DM, comment or email: **[scripts@velvet-waltz.com](mailto:scripts@velvet-waltz.com)**

**NB:** If you already know me and are interested, but I haven’t reached out yet, drop me a WhatsApp, email, Insta message or whatever you’ve got.

*LADBible Castings*
SHOOT 1: Looking for genuine football fans who support Germany, Belgium, USA, Netherlands, Curacao, Uzbekistan or Haiti for a LADBible shoot on the 21st of May. Will consist of chatting about your team & why you support them. £200 payment. Must be aged 25+

SHOOT 2: Looking for Scottish fans of the Scotland football team to appear on a LADBible billboard in kilts on 11th May. Needed for a few hours on the day. £200 payment. Must be aged 25+

To apply, please e-mail erica.stein@ladbiblegroup.com & let me know which casting if of interest.

📢 THE REVOLUTION HAS A NAME: SODIES KASI TV! 🎬🔥
Meadowlands, the wait is over. We aren't just a channel; we are the heartbeat of the 10 Zones. We are the lens of the youth, the voice of the hustle, and the home of the untold story.

⚠️ THE REALITY CHECK (Building from Zero)
We want to be 100% transparent with our community. We are a Grassroots Startup proving that you don't need a million-rand budget to have a billion-rand vision.

NO Professional Tools: We use our smartphones and our brains. 📱🧠

NO Big Budget: We are fueled by pure passion and Kasi discipline. 💸❌

NO Physical Building: The streets of Ndofaya are our studio. 🏘️🛣️
If we can start with nothing, you have no excuse to stay still!

📺 OUR PRODUCTION LINEUP (The Sodies Slate)
We are currently filming and scouting for the following shows:

MEADOWLANDS HEART & THE BLOOD COIN: Our flagship dramas. Raw, high-tension storytelling.

KASI SOUL SESSION: A safe space to vent, confess, or share your "Glow-Up" story. (Anonymity respected).

THE HUSTLE PROFILE: Highlighting the entrepreneurs of the 10 Zones.

JUNIOR QUIZ REVOLUTION: 15 Learners competing for the title of the smartest in the Kasi. 🧠🏆

KASI NEWS & YOUTH VOICE: The headlines that matter to us, by us.

THE STAGE: Showcasing DJs, Producers, Poets, and Dancers. 🎧✍️

🚀 HOW TO JOIN THE MOVEMENT
1. FOR ACTORS & CREW (The Founding 40):
We are looking for raw talent, not just resumes. If you have the heart to build this with us, apply below.
👉 APPLY HERE: [https://form.svhrt.com/69b5fc522ac0ef04c5970eab]

2. FOR THE SOUL SESSION (Vents & Confessions):
To share your story or your "Before & After" Glow-Up, you must follow our professional format.
👉 EMAIL: infosodieskasitv@gmail.com
(Subject: [SOUL SESSION] - Name/Alias - Zone)

3. FOR TALENT & MUSIC (DJs, Producers, Poets):
Want us to feature your craft or use your beats in our soundtracks?
👉 EMAIL: infosodieskasitv@gmail.com

CASTING CALL!

Hello currently casting for a SAG-AFTRA short film “Let Him Play”

In need of the following roles:

Ryan (18)

Neurodivergent, sensitive, observant, and full

of unexpected wonder. His quirks include

tapping, wiping his nose, headphones on, masking

an extraordinary ear for music that no one has ever nurtured.

Julie (50)

A loving mother suffocated by a

failing marriage. She believes in her

boys but is trapped in survival mode.

Please send headshots and info to [lethimplayinfo@gmail.com](mailto:lethimplayinfo@gmail.com)

And we will send you instructions for self tape!

Shooting near LA in Lancaster June 27th and 28th!

items.text:
Looking for an elderly 70-80 year old man to play the role of Grandpa Nick. He should have a look similar to of Robert De Niro- good physic, olive skin, a Mediterranean / Greek look. Very ethnic look. This role does not have any dialogue and would be to shoot one short scene.

scene. 

Also looking to cast a couple female actresses in the 30-40 age range to be background actors in one short scene. 

Synopsis:

Unforgettable is a story of a woman’s desperate attempt to get pregnant and on her journey, gets an unexpected message from her beloved Grandfather from the afterlife.

And how the signs along the way of her journey, whispered to her, what gifts would be put in her path. A true story of one woman’s synchronicity and love. 

PLEASE NOTE: this is a student film, it is no pay but all actors will receive IMDb credits. 

FILMING IN THE LOS ANGELES AREA.

LOS ANGELES CASTING 🇳🇱

SKECHERS commercial for DUTCH TV featuring soccer legend Ruud Gullit.

Seeking fluent/native Dutch speakers in Los Angeles for one-line principal roles.

Must be LA local hire and able to self-report to set in Los Angeles.

Non-Union. FICORE welcome.
Rate: $1,500 + 20% AF
Shoot: May 11 in Los Angeles
Fitting: May 8 in Los Angeles
Callbacks: May 7 via Zoom
Self-tapes: April 30 – May 6

ROLES:
Athletic Gym-Goer — Woman, 18–30
Athletic Man — Man, 30–40
Car Valet — Man, 18–29
Soccer Fan — Man, 30–40
Restaurant Diner — Man, 40–50
Waiter — Woman, 18–30

All ethnic appearances welcome.

Must speak real fluent Dutch — not Duolingo Dutch.

Submit via Casting Networks:
https://app.castingnetworks.com/public-pages/open-call/skechers-slip-ins-dutch-tv/13ced886-4469-11f1-8db6-331d4b78bece

Please share with Dutch speakers, Dutch actors, Dutch expats, and Netherlands/Benelux community members in Los Angeles.

ʙʀɪᴇꜰ #094 — ʟᴀʀɢᴇ ꜱᴄᴀʟᴇ ᴄᴀꜱᴛɪɴɢ ᴄᴀʟʟ 

ᴡᴇ ᴀʀᴇ ᴄᴜʀʀᴇɴᴛʟʏ ᴄᴀꜱᴛɪɴɢ ꜰᴏʀ ᴛʜᴇ ʀᴏᴏᴛᴇᴅ ʟᴏᴏᴋʙᴏᴏᴋ — ᴀ ᴍᴜʟᴛɪ-ꜱᴄᴇɴᴇ ᴘʀᴏᴅᴜᴄᴛɪᴏɴ ʀᴇQᴜɪʀɪɴɢ 40+ ɪɴᴅɪᴠɪᴅᴜᴀʟꜱ ᴀᴄʀᴏꜱꜱ ᴠᴀʀɪᴏᴜꜱ ʀᴏʟᴇꜱ.

ᴛʜᴇ ᴄʟɪᴇɴᴛ ɪꜱ ꜱᴇᴇᴋɪɴɢ ᴀ ᴅɪᴠᴇʀꜱᴇ ᴄᴀꜱᴛ ᴀᴄʀᴏꜱꜱ ᴀɢᴇꜱ, ᴄᴏᴍᴘʟᴇxɪᴏɴꜱ, ᴀɴᴅ ʙᴀᴄᴋɢʀᴏᴜɴᴅꜱ, ᴡɪᴛʜ ᴀ ꜱᴛʀᴏɴɢ ᴇᴍᴘʜᴀꜱɪꜱ ᴏɴ ᴄᴜʟᴛᴜʀᴀʟ ᴀᴜᴛʜᴇɴᴛɪᴄɪᴛʏ, ᴘʀᴇꜱᴇɴᴄᴇ, ᴀɴᴅ ɴᴀᴛᴜʀᴀʟ ᴏɴ-ꜱᴇᴛ ᴘᴇʀꜰᴏʀᴍᴀɴᴄᴇ.

ᴀᴛᴛᴀᴄʜᴇᴅ ɪꜱ ᴀ ꜰᴜʟʟ ᴏᴠᴇʀᴠɪᴇᴡ ᴏꜰ ᴀʟʟ ʀᴇQᴜɪʀᴇᴅ ʀᴏʟᴇꜱ.

ᴅᴇᴛᴀɪʟᴇᴅ ʙʀᴇᴀᴋᴅᴏᴡɴꜱ ʜᴀᴠᴇ ʙᴇᴇɴ ꜱᴛʀᴜᴄᴛᴜʀᴇᴅ ɪɴᴛᴏ 5 ꜱᴇᴘᴀʀᴀᴛᴇ ʙʀɪᴇꜰꜱ, ᴇᴀᴄʜ ᴏᴜᴛʟɪɴɪɴɢ ꜱᴘᴇᴄɪꜰɪᴄ ʀᴇQᴜɪʀᴇᴍᴇɴᴛꜱ ᴘᴇʀ ʀᴏʟᴇ. ᴛʜᴇꜱᴇ ᴀʀᴇ ᴀᴠᴀɪʟᴀʙʟᴇ ᴏɴ ᴛʜᴇ ᴡʜᴀᴛꜱᴀᴘᴘ ᴄʜᴀɴɴᴇʟ.

ᴛᴏ ʙᴇ ᴄᴏɴꜱɪᴅᴇʀᴇᴅ, ᴘʟᴇᴀꜱᴇ:
• ꜰᴏʟʟᴏᴡ ᴛʜᴇ ᴄʜᴀɴɴᴇʟ  
• ʀᴇᴠɪᴇᴡ ᴛʜᴇ ʀᴇʟᴇᴠᴀɴᴛ ʙʀɪᴇꜰ ᴄᴀʀᴇꜰᴜʟʟʏ  
• ꜱᴜʙᴍɪᴛ ᴏɴʟʏ ꜰᴏʀ ʀᴏʟᴇꜱ ʏᴏᴜ ᴀᴄᴄᴜʀᴀᴛᴇʟʏ ꜰɪᴛ  

📲 ꜰᴏʀ ᴀʟʟ ʙʀɪᴇꜰ ᴅᴇᴛᴀɪʟꜱ:  
https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029Vb36BNyJ93wXH19fMW2U

📩 ꜰᴏʀ Qᴜᴇꜱᴛɪᴏɴꜱ, ᴡʜᴀᴛꜱᴀᴘᴘ ᴀᴅᴀ ᴏɴ:  +27 76 180 2729  

⚠️ ᴘʟᴇᴀꜱᴇ ᴀᴠᴏɪᴅ ꜱᴇɴᴅɪɴɢ “ʜɪ/ʜᴇʏ” ᴍᴇꜱꜱᴀɢᴇꜱ — ᴏɴʟʏ ꜱᴛʀᴜᴄᴛᴜʀᴇᴅ ꜱᴜʙᴍɪꜱꜱɪᴏɴꜱ ᴏʀ ᴄʟᴇᴀʀ Qᴜᴇꜱᴛɪᴏɴꜱ ᴡɪʟʟ ʙᴇ ʀᴇꜱᴘᴏɴᴅᴇᴅ ᴛᴏ.

ꜱᴜʙᴍɪꜱꜱɪᴏɴꜱ ᴛʜᴀᴛ ᴅᴏ ɴᴏᴛ ꜰᴏʟʟᴏᴡ ᴛʜᴇ ʙʀɪᴇꜰ ʀᴇQᴜɪʀᴇᴍᴇɴᴛꜱ ᴡɪʟʟ ɴᴏᴛ ʙᴇ ᴄᴏɴꜱɪᴅᴇʀᴇᴅ.

Shamanic, Physical Theatre Workshop - London, 22nd May
Hi All, I'm running KINSHIP - a low-cost day workshop for actors and performers who are interested in learning a shamanic approach to physical theatre and ensemble work. Lots of play, lots of connection, uplifting dance, rhythm exercises and movement-based storytelling.  

Link to Facebook Event:  https://fb.me/e/49UwDbf9X

22nd May, London SE23 - 10:30am - 3:30pm - £25.00. 

To book, please email: ros@rosalindparker.co.uk

items.text:
🎭 Question for actors ready to build a working career (not just train)?
Hi everyone, my name is Freya Tingley. I’m an actress who has worked on international film and television projects, including two Netflix series. I starred in Jersey Boys directed by Clint Eastwood and played Wendy Darling on Once Upon a Time.

I’ve been really grateful for the number of messages lately. It’s been amazing connecting with so many of you.

One thing keeps coming up again and again:

Actors are doing everything they’re told and still not moving forward.

You train. You get your materials together. You’re told “just get an agent.”
But then you get one and nothing happens.
Or you don’t have one yet and have no clear path to getting there.

That frustration is exactly why I created this.

• How to position yourself to attract the right representation
• What to focus on if you don’t yet have an agent

• How to approach auditions and self tapes strategically

You leave with a clear, personalised plan so you’re not stuck wondering when the next audition is coming or why you’re not booking. You know exactly what steps to take next.

items.text:
BACKGROUND ACTORS NEEDED - NON UNION CASTING CALL
My name is Sanvi Bhardwaj and I am the producer of the student led short film called Method of Madness. I am hosting an open casting call that is looking for **NON UNION ACTORS **to be *background cast* in our project which will be filming on **MAY 20. **Exact call times for background cast is TBD however, we would need you to keep your entire day available until the exact times are confirmed.

The background cast are bar patrons who are seated in the bar. 

The background we are looking for:

-any ethnicity

-non-union

-available all day on May 20th 2026

The deadline for submissions to our email is **May 04** **2026** @ 11:59PM.

Method of Madness is written to explore the pressure within the acting world to perform masculinity in extreme ways. The story critiques the idea that vulnerability in men must be expressed through aggression or intensity rather than emotional honesty. Through Jeremy’s descent into method acting, the film asks an important question: when does dedication to art become destructive to the people around us?

SYNOPSIS: Jeremy Leonard and his wife Naomi are ecstatic when he books his breakout role in a feature playing a deranged serial killer. The two hoping the film will bring them closer to their dream of a family. However, Jeremy immerses himself in the role, and dedication turns into obsession as he chooses to go method. As his erratic and violent behaviour towards his wife increases so does the critical acclaim of his film. Leaving Naomi stuck between two versions of her husband. The instant global sensation, the killer that made him famous.

Please provide your introduction of who you are, headshots, and demo reel/portfolio to our email.

Please send your information to our email: **methodofmadness.shortfilm@gmail.com **and follow us on Instagram @methodofmadness.shortfilm !

Please note that this set will be **unpaid** however, crafty will be on set. You are still expected to bring your own lunch as crafty is not substitute for a meal. We hope to hear from you :)

🎬 CASTING CALL – VANCOUVER - PAID
We’re currently casting for a Kickstarter commercial shoot and looking for:

• Male talent (right-handed preferred)

• Comfortable working with hands-on tools on camera

• Natural, confident presence on screen

📅 Shoot date: May 6

⏱ Duration: Full day (approx. 8 hours)

💰 Rate: $300/day

⸻

Project details:

We’ll be filming a craft cutting tool used for precise, hands-on work (cutting materials like leather, wood, etc.).

This is a hands-focused shoot, so it’s important that you feel comfortable performing simple cutting actions on camera.

📩 How to apply:

If you feel like you’d be a good fit, please leave a comment or send me a message with your demo reel/portfolio — I’ll share more details.

Feel free to share if you know someone who fits 🙌

I added some references of what we will be creating to provide some clarity

items.text:
NOW CASTING 

Looking for an elderly 70-80 year old man to play the role of Grandpa Nick. He should have a look similar to of Robert De Niro- good physic, olive skin, a Mediterranean / Greek look. Very ethnic look. This role does not have any dialogue and would be to shoot one short scene.

scene. 

Also looking to cast a couple female actresses in the 30-40 age range to be background actors in one short scene. 

Synopsis:

Unforgettable is a story of a woman’s desperate attempt to get pregnant and on her journey, gets an unexpected message from her beloved Grandfather from the afterlife.

And how the signs along the way of her journey, whispered to her, what gifts would be put in her path. A true story of one woman’s synchronicity and love. 

PLEASE NOTE: this is a student film, it is no pay but all actors will receive IMDb credits. 

FILMING IN THE LOS ANGELES AREA.

GINA –  ASIAN FEMALE, 30's, FIT BUILD, BODYGUARD.

LEE –  ASIAN MALE, MID 30's.

WAITRESS –  AFRICAN AMERICAN FEMALE, 20's ,CURVY BUILD, SASSY.

items.text:
🎭 Question for actors ready to build a working career (not just train)?
Hi everyone, my name is Freya Tingley. I’m an actress who has worked on international film and television projects, including two Netflix series. I starred in Jersey Boys (directed by Clint Eastwood) and played Wendy Darling on Once Upon a Time.

I’ve been amazed and grateful by the wave of interest and messages recently. It’s been amazing connecting with so many of you.

I’m now offering something I wish existed when I was starting out:

A 2-hour, 1:1 career mentorship session over Zoom.

One of the biggest frustrations I hear is this:
Actors are told “get an agent” but then once they have one, nothing happens.
And for many actors, the challenge is figuring out how to get an agent in the first place.

This session is designed for both.

We sit down and go through:
• What actually makes an actor book work (beyond just talent)
• How to position yourself to attract the right representation
• What to focus on if you don’t yet have an agent
• The materials you really need and what most actors get wrong
• How to approach auditions and self-tapes strategically
• Building a career that moves forward, not just sideways

You’ll leave with a clear, personalised plan so you’re not stuck wondering when the next audition is coming or why you’re not booking. You’ll know exactly what steps to take to create the career you want. 

If you’ve been feeling stuck or unsure, feel free to message me for details or to book.

sharedPost.text:
Looking for something new and fun to do? That won’t cost the earth but leave you feeling amazing? 🤔

Come and move, laugh and stress bust with us! My BEGINNERS dance classes are for EVERYBODY. (I can’t stress this enough. Even if you think you can’t dance, in my sessions, we don’t care!) 

Just come have a go. We move for the joy of movement and all the benefits it can bring, not for perfection or to look good. (That happens all on its own, over time. 🙌 And if that’s something you’re striving for, then I’ll help you get there. 👌)

Thursday classes begin again on May 14th. Brand new routine, great time to grab a friend and try your first class for FREE!!!! 

Can’t make Thursdays? That’s ok, drop me a message about Monday classes! 🙌

#danceclasses #liverpoolfitness #beginnersdance #tryitchallenge #FreeClass #trybeforeyoubuy #newhobby #liverpooluk

items.text:
PAID OPPORTUNITY- MANCHESTER CASTING 

We’re looking for confident actors and actresses based in Yorkshire to feature in social media shoots for a fast-growing viral marketing agency.
( Blank Viral) 

🎬 Paid Opportunities Available

Ideal candidates:

* Comfortable and confident in front of the camera

* Able to deliver natural, engaging performances for short-form content (TikTok, Instagram Reels, etc.)

* Open to creative direction and experimenting with different concepts

This is a great opportunity to build your portfolio, gain exposure, and be part of high-performing viral campaigns.

Interested? Get in touch with your portfolio/showreel and availability.

items.text:
INDUSTRY SPEED DATING LITTLE FLIX LONDON FILM FESTIVAL
https://www.littleflixlondonfilmfestival.com/copy-of-pitch-your-long-form-work

If you’re not at the Little Flix London Film Festival on 27 June 2026… where are you?

Join us at the iconic BFI, Stephen Street, for a full day of screenings, hands-on workshops, and unbeatable networking with fellow creatives and select industry guests. https://www.littleflixlondonfilmfestival.com/events-1

🎬 Tickets from just £11–£35 https://www.eventbrite.co.uk/e/little-flix-london-film-festival-the-bfi-tickets-1986341913133?aff=ebdsshcopyurl&utm-campaign=social&utm-content=attendeeshare&utm-medium=discovery&utm-term=organizer-profile&utm-share-source=organizer-profile
🎟️ One curated block per attendee – choose your experience.

Don’t miss out—this is where film, creativity, and opportunity come together.

Follow for updates @LittleFlix

🎬 Tickets from just £11–£35 https://www.eventbrite.co.uk/e/little-flix-london-film-festival-the-bfi-tickets-1986341913133?aff=ebdsshcopyurl&utm-campaign=social&utm-content=attendeeshare&utm-medium=discovery&utm-term=organizer-profile&utm-share-source=organizer-profile
🎟️ One curated block per attendee – choose your experience.

Don’t miss out—this is where film, creativity, and opportunity come together.

Follow for updates @LittleFlix

🎬Trudne Sprawy🎬

Poszukuję do roli:

Tomek Łuczak 35 lat 
Wygląd: Atrakcyjny, dobrze zbudowany, poważny- Terminy zdjęć 14.05-16.05. Osoby z doświadczeniem na planie. 

Proszę o uważne przeczytanie opisu postaci. Rozpatrywane będą zgłoszenia od osób, które pasują do opisu.

Dla osób spoza Wrocławia poza wynagrodzeniem za role, bukuję hotel oraz zwracam za koszty transportu w jedna i druga stronę.
Wszystko płatne gotówką na planie po zakończeniu zdjęć.
Zainteresowane osoby proszę o koment. Pod postem, lub o wiadomość prywatną.

items.text:
🎬LOOKING FOR ACTORS TO PLAY IN AMATEUR SHORT FILM🎬

2 boys- ones who can pass for 18
1 woman- middle aged

The film is in English!

Hi, I’m a high school student in Warsaw looking to film my short film in July. The 2 boys are the main characters, while the woman appears in 3 short scenes. 
The filming would take maximum a week.
This is a surreal psychological drama taking place in the far countryside.  

Message me if you’re interested, have any questions about the screenplay, the time of filming or the sort of characters the three people are!

## 🎷 CASTING: Aktor/Saksofonista (19-28 lat)

Poszukujemy odtwórcy głównej roli do filmu krótkometrażowego. Projekt **płatny**.

**KOGO SZUKAMY?**
* Mężczyzna w wieku **19–21 lat**.
* **Umiejętność gry na saksofonie** (warunek konieczny).

**ZGŁOSZENIA:** Wyślij maila na adres: **korab.karo@gmail.com**

**W treści prosimy o:**
1. Imię, nazwisko i wiek.
2. Aktualne zdjęcia (twarz i sylwetka).
3. Krótkie nagranie (self-tape), na którym przedstawiasz się i grasz dowolny fragment na saksofonie.

items.text:
Hi everyone 👋

We’re Mangata Production, a new indie film production based in Vancouver, currently casting a **supporting female role** for a short film directed by **Regis Raffin**.

📍 **Shoot:** 1 day in June (exact date TBC)
📍 **Location:** North Vancouver (forest setting)
💰** $300 for the day**
🎬 **Non-union production**

We are looking for a **striking, model-type actress (between 20–40)** with natural confidence, and a good sense of humour! The role appears in a short, stylized and slightly surreal forest scene. Minimal dialogue.

📸 Please send:
* Headshot / standing shots
* Reel (if available) 
* Availability in June

Email us at : contact@mangata-music.com

Thanks!

sharedPost.text:
AUDITION NOTICE: Barefoot in the Park

Barefoot in the Park by Neil Simon follows Paul and Corie Bratter, a pair of newlyweds moving into their first apartment in 1960s Greenwich Village. The honeymoon phase is quickly tested by a tiny, top-floor walk-up with no heat, a hole in the skylight, and a cast of eccentric neighbours. As Paul’s straight-laced legal mind clashes with Corie’s spontaneous, free-spirited nature, the couple must navigate their first major marital spat and decide if they can truly walk "barefoot in the park" together.

Creative Team:        Director: Julianne Christie          Producers: Janet Ellis, Michele Partridge

Production Details:
Audition Date: May 20, 2026
Audition & Performance Location: Peninsula Studio Theatre, 14600 North Bluff Rd, White Rock, BC
Rehearsals: Specific Dates TBD. June – September 2026
Performance Dates: September 17 – 27, 2026
Compensation: Actor Honorarium provided.
Perks: Free parking and food/refreshments provided at all rehearsals.

Character Breakdown:
Corie Bratter (Lead, Female, 20s to 30s): A free-spirited, optimistic newlywed who sees the world through rose-colored glasses. Must have high energy and excellent comedic timing.
Paul Bratter (Lead, Male, 20s–30s): HAS BEEN CAST
Ethel Banks (Supporting, Female, 40s–60s): Corie’s cautious and slightly weary mother. She finds herself on an unexpected adventure thanks to her daughter.
Victor Velasco (Supporting, Male, 40s–60s): The eccentric, colourful, and flirtatious neighbour from the attic. A larger-than-life character.
Telephone Repairman (Supporting, Open Age/Male): A grounded character who gets a front-row seat to the Bratters' domestic chaos.
Delivery Person (Supporting, Open Age/Male): A comedic role focused on the physical toll of climbing those six flights of stairs.

**Submission Instructions:
Please email your headshot and resume to: Janet Ellis, Executive Director, janet@peninsulaproductions.org
Selection Process: Sides and a specific audition time will be emailed to those selected to audition on May 20.
Deadline: Please submit your materials promptly for consideration.

We look forward to hearing from you!

items.text:
CASTING CALL – VIDEO / FASHION COLLABORATION – BERLIN
Hi! My name is Hanna and I’m a producer based in Berlin, currently working on a fashion video editorial in collaboration with Naomi Tarazi. 

We are shooting with a professional production team in a Berlin hotel location.

Looking for:
– Female model
– East / Southeast Asian appearance
– Slim build, strong natural presence
– Comfortable in front of camera (video & stills)

Concept:
A clean, intimate hotel setting with a slightly awkward, off-balance mood. Focus on body lines, movement, and subtle, unconventional posing.

Mood:
– minimal
– quiet
– slightly strange / cinematic
– feminine but not overly polished

Styling:
Naomi Tarazi garments (sculptural silhouettes, tights, textures) + mix of minimalistic clothes and designer pieces 

HMU:
Natural skin, simple hair (straight / tied)

Shooting:
– within the next month
– Berlin (hotel location)
– professional crew on set (production studio)

You will receive:
THIS IS AN UNPAID POSITION
– professional video material + edited images for your portfolio

Moodboard attached

If you feel aligned with this aesthetic, please DM me or comment with your portfolio / Instagram and I’ll end you more details✨

Or reach me by this Email Address: hanna@nusual.studio
Selected models may be considered for future collaborations

sharedPost.text:
SCHOS – My little Lake

Ein kleiner See, viel Licht, stille Wege am Ufer: My little Lake ist unser neuer Song mit englischen Lyrics – über einen Ort, an dem Fantasie und Himmel im Wasser spiegeln und der Kopf endlich ruhig wird.

Die Musik kommt aus Simbach am Inn, die Band aus mehreren Ländern – Rock mit klaren Melodien, englischem Text und viel Raum zum Eintauchen.

🎧 My little Lake ist bei allen gut sortierten Anbietern als Download und Stream verfügbar – z.B. Apple Music, Amazon Music und vielen weiteren Stores.

Musiker (Auszug)
Schos Riedl – keys, songwriting, production (Simbach am Inn, Bayern)
Racquel Roberts, voc (USA)
Mark Corradetti – bass (USA)
Paul Simmons – drums (USA)
Clint Wells – guitars (USA)

Mehr über SCHOS & alle Musiker:
🌐 Band: https://bandschos.com
🎼 Musiker & Credits: https://bandschos.com/musiker

© SCHOS – Schos Riedl. All rights reserved.

Hashtags (unter den Post setzen):

#SCHOS #MylittleLake #Rockmusic #EnglishLyrics #IndieRock #Simbach #AppleMusic #AmazonMusic #TimelessMusic

items.text:
Wir suchen dich! Arktos (m/w/d) !

Das Musical der Schwaben-Bühne e.V. wird im Oktober im alten Kino Bissingen erneut eine Wiederaufnahme spielen.
Nach 10 ausverkauften Vorstellungen soll unser Kinder- und Erwachsenen Musical neuen Flair bekommen und uns in Bissingen eine neue Spielstätte schaffen.

Hast du Lust für den guten Zweck auf die Bühne zu gehen ?
Und das in einem tollen Team?
Dann melde dich einfach bei uns ! 
Tabaluga-schwabenbuehne@gmx.de 
Wir freuen uns auf dich!

items.text:
Dignity Memorial Testimonial Casting
**DIGNITY MEMORIAL & REAL SIMPLE are looking to share stories of people who have chosen to memorialize their loved ones through cremation.**

*Ideal candidates are people in or near retirement age who have used a Dignity Memorial-affiliated cemetery or memorial park to plan a cremation and memorialize a loved one. All selected talent will be compensated.*

- Did you work with a funeral home or cremation service affiliated with Dignity Memorial?

- Did you decide to memorialize your loved one through cremation?
- Are you open to sharing your experience honoring your loved one through cremation in a digital video?

Dignity Memorial, Real Simple, and People Inc. are looking for real people who have worked with a cemetery or memorial park affiliated with Dignity Memorial to help honor a deceased loved one through cremation. Selected individuals will be featured in a moving digital video on platforms such as Real Simple. This digital video features the story of someone who chose cremation for a loved one and planned the memorial arrangements. They reflect on their experience and share why they chose to honor their loved one in this way. 

If you are interested in being considered for this paid opportunity, please fill out our casting questionnaire at: https://memorialcremation.castingcrane.com/ or email us directly at casting@pairedupmedia.com

items.text:
✨NORTHERN CALIFORNIA WOMEN / TEENS CASTING CALL ✨

I’m currently casting northern Cali based girls and young women ages 14 to 26 for an upcoming creative project centered around elevated, feminine content and visual storytelling.

This project is designed to give everyday girls the opportunity to step into high quality, styled content whether you have experience or not.

We’re focusing on
Content creation photo and video
Lifestyle and editorial style shoots
Brand campaigns and creative direction
Building a strong, elevated digital presence

This is for girls who
Are interested in modeling, content creation, or being on camera
Appreciate a soft, feminine, or polished aesthetic
Want to try something new or grow in confidence

No experience is required.

Styled shoots
High quality, content

If you’d like to be considered 

California -based preferred
Email Victoriaroberts747@gmail.com
Subject: CALIFORNIA CASTING
Include your name, age, location, and 2 to 3 photos no professional photos needed

If under 18, parental consent is required.

APPLICATIONS NOW OPEN – NOTTS TALENT LIVE 2026!🌟
Have you got what it takes to be the first year winner of Notts Talent Live 2026 and WIN a fantastic £500 CASH PRIZE plus other AMAZING Prizes!

Applications are OPEN for anyone that has talent across the UK. We’d love to see it!

If you think you’ve got an amazing talent that our celebrities judges NEED to see, what are you waiting for?

APPLY NOW: https://form.jotform.com/261022571081042

This year we are also proud to be raising money for Lincs & Notts Air Ambulance.

Last Date for Applications: 23:00pm on Sunday 3rd May 2026.

Follow Notts Talent Live for updates and application details.
